entity_types.name: Camera
entity_types.description: A video camera or stream that can capture face recognition events.

entity_types.name: Place
entity_types.description: A physical place where cameras are installed.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: A person recognized by a face recognition event.

entity_types.name: FaceEvent
entity_types.description: A face recognition event captured by a camera and optionally matched to a person.

relation_types.name: LOCATED_AT
relation_types.description: Connects a Camera to the Place where it is installed.

relation_types.name: CAPTURED_BY
relation_types.description: Connects a FaceEvent to the Camera that captured it.

relation_types.name: MATCHED_PERSON
relation_types.description: Connects a FaceEvent to the Person recognized in it.
